ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd

# Load the CSV file
file_path = '/mnt/data/assistant-SyrH5B3dHp4SwL8fbvLQJ3-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv'
data = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Display the first few rows of the dataframe
data.head()

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Filter data for the Transportation sector
transportation_data = data[data['sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Create bar chart for operating profit
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))
plt.barh(transportation_data['name'], transportation_data['operating_profit'], color='skyblue')
plt.xlabel('Operating Profit')
plt.title('Operating Profit in the Transportation Sector')
plt.grid(axis='x', linestyle='--', alpha=0.7)
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the plot to a file
plot_path = '/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png'
plt.savefig(plot_path)

plt.show()

# Provide the file path
plot_path

content.text:
The bar chart for operating profit in the transportation sector has been created. You can download it using the following link:

[Download the Transportation Operating Profit Chart](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit.png)
